  <!-- listener (right) head -->

    <ellipse rx="76" ry="86" fill="#f2d3b3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="3" />

    <path d="M-58,-60 C-30,-100 40,-100 62,-62 C50,-40 30,-48 -10,-40 C-40,-36 -58,-52 -58,-60 Z" fill="#6b4a36" opacity="0.95" />

    <ellipse cx="76" cy="0" rx="12" ry="18" fill="#f2d3b3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="2" />
    <path d="M74,0 C72,-4 66,-6 64,0 C66,4 72,6 74,0" fill="none" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- eye (subtle) -->
    <circle cx="-10" cy="-8" r="4" fill="#3b2b20" opacity="0.9" />
    <!-- shoulder -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="98" rx="110" ry="36" fill="#d9e3f0" opacity="0.6" />
  </g>

  <!-- whisperer (left) head -->
  <g transform="translate(170,250)">
    <ellipse rx="68" ry="80" fill="#f3cfa3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="3" />
    <!-- hair -->
    <path d="M-54,-54 C-28,-86 30,-96 62,-62 C42,-46 6,-40 -20,-42 C-46,-44 -54,-54 -54,-54 Z" fill="#4b2f26" />
    <!-- nose (profile) -->
    <path d="M46,-2 C60,-2 68,6 62,12 C58,16 48,18 44,14" fill="#f3cfa3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- mouth (near ear of listener) -->
    <path d="M38,18 C52,20 62,10 56,6" fill="none" stroke="#a25b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- hand near mouth -->
    <g transform="translate(28,32) rotate(-15)">
      <ellipse rx="18" ry="12" fill="#f3cfa3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="2" />
      <path d="M-8,0 C-6,-6 6,-6 10,0" fill="#f3cfa3" stroke="#b98a5c" stroke-width="1.5" />
    </g>
    <!-- shoulder -->
    <ellipse cx="10" cy="98" rx="110" ry="36" fill="#e8d7c3" opacity="0.7" />
  </g>

  <!-- faint sound lines indicating whisper -->
  <g stroke="#9aa6b3" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55">
    <path d="M210,260 C240,255 270,250 300,252" stroke-width="3.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <path d="M220,272 C250,268 280,266 308,270" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.45"/>
    <path d="M225,246 C256,240 284,236 310,238" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>

  <!-- subtle ground shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="430" rx="170" ry="22" fill="#d6dbe6" opacity="0.25" />
</svg>
